name: Tatsu
description: Fearsome and noble, the elegant two-handed Nikana is the pride of any Arsenal. Kills build charges and seeking projectiles are unleashed with a Slide Attack to find and stun unwitting enemies. When Revenant wields this blade, Tatsu's charge cap is increased.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Auroxium Alloy
components.description:
Auron that has been forged into a stronger metal.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fearsome and noble, the elegant two-handed Nikana is the pride of any Arsenal. Kills build charges and seeking projectiles are unleashed with a Slide Attack to find and stun unwitting enemies. When Revenant wields this blade, Tatsu's charge cap is increased.

components.name: Hespazym Alloy
components.description:
A compound formed from Hesperon.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Kuva
components.description:
Kuva is an exceedingly rare red fluid coveted by the Grineer Queens. It can be obtained in Kuva Missions, and is used to Cycle Rivens or build rare blueprints.

Location: Kuva Siphon Missions and Taveuni (Kuva Fortress)

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Wolf Sledge, Telos Boltace, Zenith, Tatsu, Tatsu Prime, and Staticor from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Tatsu Prime Blueprint 
Tatsu Prime Handle

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.changes:
Get instant access to the latest Prime Warframe with Revenant Prime Access. Add Revenant Prime along with his signature Prime Weapons Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime, and exclusive Prime Accessories along with Resource and Affinity Boosters to your Arsenal.
Tatsu Prime glows with spectral splendor. It grows more powerful with each enemy’s demise, especially when wielded by Revenant.
Get Revenant Prime instantly with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Revenant Prime, Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime. Find the Prime Access packs here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemy teleporting while performing a stealth kill with a Two-Handed Nikana (Tatsu, Pennant, etc.).

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a rectangle effect appearing around Mirage's Eclipse while wielding Tatsu with the Solstice skin.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tatsu ground slam often failing to connect.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tatsu missing its forward momentum when changing directions.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Melee front-finisher sounds for the Tatsu.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tatsu’s Soul Swarm mechanic not stacking for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tatsu unique mechanic no longer functioning correctly once a player dies and revives.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.6.2 + 24.6.2.1
patchlogs.changes: The Tatsu Soul Swarm (Revenant) projectiles now have a lifetime of 5 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Removed an unintended projectile launch on the 2nd charge attack of the Tatsu. This feature (as many have already determined) is unfinished, and will be revisited in the near future. Possibly tied to a certain Warframe...

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing finisher sounds for the Tatsu.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Tatsu can be acquired in the Market.
